channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Wolves and Tottenham Battle for Crucial Premier League Points
item.description: Tottenham are still in the relegation zone as they take on Wolves in a pivotal Premier League clash. The game is crucial for Spurs' survival, coming off a recent heartbreaking draw against Brighton. E...

item.title: Highway 16 near Jasper closed due to rock slide with no detour available
item.description: A section of Highway 16, located approximately 12 kilometres west of Jasper, Alberta, has been closed in both directions following a significant rock slide. The Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) is...

item.title: Man Killed in Shooting in Toronto’s West End, Homicide Investigation Underway
item.description: A man has died following a shooting in Toronto's west-end, prompting the city's homicide unit to take over the investigation. Authorities were called to the scene early in the morning on April 25, 202...

item.title: Election Commission directs suspension of five West Bengal police officers over poll duty misconduct
item.description: The Election Commission of India (EC) has directed the West Bengal government to suspend five police officers posted in Diamond Harbour for alleged misconduct during the ongoing Assembly elections. Th...

item.title: Tongaat mother speaks out after ex-husband kills daughters and leaves financial instructions in suicide note
item.description: Nicole Govender, a 37-year-old IT specialist from Tongaat, has shared the emotional turmoil she faces following the tragic deaths of her daughters, Amelia Hope (6) and Elena Faith (4), who were allege...

item.title: Power supply to Diepkloof hostel cut over unpaid Eskom debt amid protest and unrest
item.description: A prolonged power outage at the Diepkloof hostel in Soweto has been linked to unpaid debt on an Eskom account, according to Johannesburg’s City Power. The outage sparked significant unrest on Saturday...

item.title: The Challenges and Realities of Modern Retirement
item.description: Dave Schilling reflects on the growing difficulties of achieving retirement in contemporary society. He contrasts the fantasy of retiring to leisurely pursuits with the harsh reality faced by many, pa...

item.title: US stocks climb to record levels as geopolitical optimism and tech gains lift markets
item.description: US equity markets finished the week on a strong note, with the S&P 500 reaching a new record high amid renewed optimism around geopolitical developments and the technology sector. Investor sentiment w...

item.title: Chadema expels Odero amidst legal allegations
item.description: Chadema, a major opposition party in Tanzania, has announced the expulsion of its member, Charles Odero, who previously served as the Secretary of the party's Legal and Human Rights Committee. The dec...

item.title: Costco Recalls Pizza Kits in Canada Due to Mould Contamination
item.description: Canadian consumers are being warned not to eat certain pizza kits sold at Costco stores due to potential mould contamination. The recall affects specific batches of pizza kits, which have been found t...

item.title: ABS-CBN Programs and Journalist Michael Delizo Receive Recognition at Gandingan Awards 2026
item.description: The 2026 Gandingan Awards celebrated outstanding achievements in Philippine broadcasting, recognizing the contributions of journalists and media programs that uphold public service and Filipino values...

item.title: US Justice Department to add alternative methods to federal executions amid drug shortages
item.description: The US Justice Department has announced plans to include firing squads, electrocution, and gas asphyxiation as additional methods for federal executions, due to difficulties in obtaining drugs for let...

item.title: Kenyan Nurse Shares Journey Building 5-Bedroom Family Home in Ohio
item.description: Judy Nyakerario Misoro, a Kisii-born nurse working in Columbus, Ohio, has successfully completed building a five-bedroom home for her family of seven, including a finished basement. Frustrated with li...

item.title: Chernobyl Disaster: The Families Still Affected 40 Years On
item.description: The 40th anniversary of the Chernobyl disaster highlights the long-lasting trauma suffered by those who lived in the surrounding areas, particularly the families forced to leave their homes. Olena Mar...

item.title: Kiandra’s resonant rocks continue to puzzle visitors and experts
item.description: A long-standing curiosity in the former Snowy Mountains town of Kiandra continues to intrigue visitors: a cluster of granite boulders that produce clear, bell-like tones when struck. Despite years of ...

item.title: AAP protests outside MPs’ residences after they quit the party to join BJP
item.description: On April 25, 2026, the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) staged protests outside the homes of three Rajya Sabha MPs — Harbhajan Singh, Ashok Mittal, and Rajinder Gupta — who recently left AAP and joined the Bhara...

item.title: Court Delays Deportation for Jaskirat Singh Sidhu, Driver of Humboldt Broncos Crash
item.description: Jaskirat Singh Sidhu, the truck driver responsible for the 2018 Humboldt Broncos bus crash, has been granted a temporary deferral of his deportation by a Federal Court judge. Sidhu was convicted of ca...

item.title: Three more players added to Spikers' Turf All-Star lineup

item.title: Taliban assures safe return for Afghans stranded in Qatar
item.description: The Taliban government on Saturday reassured Afghans currently in Qatar that they may return home with full confidence. These individuals, who fled Afghanistan fearing reprisals for working with US fo...
